description_long: This is a plastic beverage bottle with a cylindrical body and a slightly tapered neck, topped with a light gray screw cap. The bottle features a prominent red and white label wrapped around its midsection, with the iconic Coca-Cola logo clearly visible on the front. The body of the bottle is a dark brown color, suggesting it is meant to represent a cola drink, and the label is bordered by white bands at the top and bottom. The cap is smooth and slightly domed, contrasting with the darker body. The base of the bottle has a typical PET bottle design with small feet for stability. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the bottle appears to be full or nearly full of liquid.
description: A dark brown plastic beverage bottle with a red and white Coca-Cola label and a light gray screw cap. The bottle is cylindrical with a stable base and appears to be filled with liquid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola logo prominently on the red and white label, with the light gray cap and dark brown body clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view showing the side of the label with partial logo text, and the transition between the label and the bottle's dark brown body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the label, with no visible branding or text, and the bottle's dark brown color.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the edge of the Coca-Cola logo on the label, with the rest of the label and bottle body visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Red and white Coca-Cola logo and text on a label wrapped around the bottle's midsection.
